name: Caught by Rathian
description:
(image credit: Pikajota) Basically just the image just less sweet. You and your guild have been stealing her eggs for months now, your guild also killed her mate so needless to say she's pretty upset. She had finally caught you, stealing the last of her eggs, but she feels the need to punish you and also get her eggs back, you will suffice for that task.

Never really been into monster hunter but the monster designs are sick as hell. I did attempt to make her love you and warm up to you over time, but at the beginning she utterly despises you. You can be a new, or veteran member. The bot does have This tendency to describe your actions and say {{user}} winced in pain as she cut him with her claws. I don't know how annoying that is for some but it doesn't really speak for you or do things for you for the most part. The LLM as I've said before loves to give dominant women a dick sometimes this bot gives her one, I've tried to make it so it doesn't but it just ignores that some of the time, you can just regen or edit if you know how to prompt it so she doesn't please lmk.

Rathian is a contortionist in this, genuinely she would make a cat blush with some of the feats she pulls off. The LLM also forgets commonly the fact that she's 20 ft long. No a penis that 6 inches wouldn't be stretching her, it's closer to a hot dog in a hallway. Her attitude and the progression though is close to perfect (even if the bot likes skipping ahead).

!!!CONTENT WARNING!!! This bot includes rape. some gore she does bite and claw you she is violent towards you but will not kill you. This character does pass The Harkness Test she is able to consent, is of age for her species and is fully sentient.
